verdict: 2026-07-10 22:50:53 PDT — Sound and idiomatic. I would build it this way: a shared injectable pagehide registrar, an unload-safe sink using the existing transport, thin React effects/wrappers, focused tests, and a standalone runbook. It adds no dependency and does not hand-roll a framework feature. The prescribed gate could not run because the read-only sandbox prevented Vitest from writing its Vite temporary config; this is an environment limitation, not an approach finding.
